title: DayOfMind
description: A vanilla+ modpack with a focus on biomes, furniture, storage, structures, lighting/ambient, graphics, sounds and more. Many small improvements, as well as many places to explore and discover.
body:
![](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/o0NSWXiU/images/30dd4442f5da1001f240de08fb3e7130a56c8a87.jpeg) # DayOfMind: Explore, Build, and Thrive Together! [![Minecraft](https://img.shields.io/badge/Minecraft-1.21.10-green?style=for-the-badge&logo=minecraft)](https://minecraft.net) [![Modloader](https://img.shields.io/badge/Modloader-Fabric-orange?style=for-the-badge&logo=fabric)](https://fabricmc.net/) [![Discord](https://img.shields.io/badge/Discord-Join_Us!-7289DA?style=for-the-badge&logo=discord&logoColor=white)](https://discord.gg/yRkqCvFcmz) [![Ko-fi](https://img.shields.io/badge/Ko--fi-Support_Me-red?style=for-the-badge&logo=kofi&logoColor=white)](https://ko-fi.com/oxfatech) [![PayPal](https://img.shields.io/badge/PayPal-Donate-blue?style=for-the-badge&logo=paypal&logoColor=white)](https://www.paypal.com/donate/?hosted_button_id=DX93QEVJU725U) [![Crowdin](https://img.shields.io/badge/Crowdin-Translate-brightgreen?style=for-the-badge&logo=crowdin&logoColor=white)](https://crowdin.com/project/dayofmind-additions) [![GitHub](https://img.shields.io/badge/GitHub-DOM_Additions-grey?style=for-the-badge&logo=github)](https://github.com/LufatZ/DOMAdditions) [![Website](https://img.shields.io/badge/Website-Oxfatech-blueviolet?style=for-the-badge)](https://oxfatech.de/) **Version Note:** This description pertains to Minecraft version 1.21.4. As the availability and feature set of individual mods can vary between different major Minecraft versions, content and features in future or past versions of the DayOfMind modpack for other Minecraft versions may differ.
💡 Advanced Tip: Managing Worlds Across Major Updates The world generation in DayOfMind is extensive and may receive significant updates between major versions of the modpack. If you're an advanced user looking to: * Smooth out chunk borders after an update, * Merge parts of an old world into a new one, or * Perform other advanced chunk operations, the **MCA Selector** tool can be very powerful. This is an external tool and its usage is optional, intended for specific scenarios. You can find a helpful tutorial on how to use MCA Selector here: * **Video Tutorial:** [How to Merge Minecraft Worlds | MCA Selector Tutorial](https://youtu.be/7vGIsrsqfkg?si=fjipBiEM6I4ena2B) Please ensure you back up your worlds before attempting any advanced modifications!
Hey there, adventurers! Are you ready to dive back into Minecraft, but experience it like never before? Welcome to **DayOfMind**, a meticulously crafted modpack for **Fabric 1.21.4** designed to take the vanilla experience you know and love and elevate it to incredible new heights. Forget just adding a few blocks; **DayOfMind** reimagines the world around you, filling it with breathtaking landscapes, stunning visual effects, immersive sounds, and countless quality-of-life improvements that make playing smoother and more enjoyable than ever. All of this is built on the performant and flexible Fabric mod loader, ensuring that even with this wealth of new content, your adventures remain smooth and optimized. This pack isn't just about solo exploration (though there's plenty of that!); it's built with community in mind. Whether you're embarking on a grand single-player journey or gathering your friends for shared discoveries on a server or LAN world, **DayOfMind** provides the tools and the world for unforgettable adventures together. ## Explore Like Never Before: A World Reimagined Prepare to lose yourself in a world brimming with diversity and wonder. **DayOfMind** dramatically transforms Minecraft's landscapes, ensuring that every direction you turn reveals something new and exciting. ### A Living, Breathing Overworld The Overworld is reborn thanks to the incredible power of **Terralith**. With nearly 100 new biomes added and almost every vanilla biome receiving significant updates, the variety is staggering. Journey through realistic terrains inspired by Yellowstone or the Scottish Highlands, or seek out fantastical realms like the floating Skylands and the mysterious Moonlight Groves. Complementing this are the unique, vanilla-styled biomes from **Traverse**, adding charming locations like Autumnal Woods and Lush Swamps. **Terrestria** further enriches the world with detailed environments such as Sakura Forests, Cypress Swamps, and volcanic islands. Exploration truly feels endless! See some of the biome magic in action: And here's a closer look at Terralith: ### The Nether Reimagined Venture into the Nether and discover dimensions far more detailed and dangerous than you remember. **Incendium** and **Cinderscapes** work together to populate the fiery depths with stunning and perilous new biomes. Brave the Ashy Shoals, navigate the Luminous Groves, explore the Quartz Flats, and survive the Withered Forests. These mods don't just add scenery; they bring new challenges, mobs, structures, and valuable rewards, making the Nether a thrilling destination once more. Explore the vibrant dangers of Cinderscapes: Witness the breathtaking additions from Incendium: For a broader look at world generation mods including Cinderscapes, check this out: [13 Best WORLD GEN MODS in MINECRAFT [FABRIC 1.21.1] by TylerTeacher](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=5-M9oN0nF9o) ### Structures Galore Get ready for dungeons and discoveries around every corner! **DayOfMind** significantly increases the density and variety of structures. **YUNG's suite of "Better" mods** completely overhauls vanilla Dungeons, Mineshafts, Strongholds, Ocean Monuments, Desert Temples, Jungle Temples, Witch Huts, and Nether Fortresses, turning them into complex, challenging, and rewarding experiences. **Repurposed Structures** adds even more twists, creating biome-specific variants of familiar structures, ensuring surprises even in well-trodden areas. Discover unique, lore-filled locations added by **Mo' Structures**, like the majestic Castle in the Sky or the industrious Pillager Factory. Delve into the depths to find Ancient Cities transformed by **Necropolis**, now larger, denser, featuring vaults, archaeology, and even an activatable portal to the End! And seek out the sprawling, mysterious **Remnants**, a massive new underground complex filled with redstone puzzles, challenging combat rooms using Trial Spawners, unique loot requiring Remnant Keys, and hidden secrets. The sheer number of places to explore means your adventures will never run dry. See the incredible transformations by YUNG's mods (example from 1.20.1): Discover the variety Repurposed Structures adds (for 1.21.1): | Mod Name               | Focus Area          | Example Additions                               | | :--------------------- | :------------------ | :---------------------------------------------- | | **Terralith** | Overworld Biomes    | ~100 new biomes (Skylands, Yellowstone), vanilla tweaks | | **Incendium** | Nether Biomes/Structures | Quartz Flats, Withered Forest, Forbidden Castle | | **Cinderscapes** | Nether Biomes       | Ashy Shoals, Luminous Grove, new blocks         | | **YUNG's Better Structures** | Structure Overhauls | Revamped Dungeons, Mineshafts, Strongholds, etc. | | **Repurposed Structures** | Structure Variants  | Biome-specific Villages, Pyramids, etc.       | | **Mo' Structures** | Unique Structures   | Castle in the Sky, Pillager Factory, Barnhouse  | | **Necropolis** | Ancient City Overhaul | Larger cities, vaults, archaeology, End portal  | | **Remnants** | New Large Structure | Combat rooms, redstone puzzles, Remnant Keys, Katana | ### Tools for the Trail Navigating this vast and complex world is made easier with essential tools. The **Traveler's Backpack** is your ultimate companion, offering expandable storage, fluid tanks, a built-in crafting grid, and handy tool slots, available in numerous styles. Set up vital fast-travel networks between your bases and discoveries using **Waystones**. Never get lost again with the indispensable **Xaero's Minimap** and **Xaero's World Map**, providing detailed real-time mapping. Enhance your maps further with **Xaeroplus** for extra features like new chunk highlighting and Baritone integration, and **XaeroZoomout** to see even more of the world at once. These tools are practically essential for managing the scale of exploration **DayOfMind** offers. ## A Feast for the Senses: Enhanced Visuals and Sound **DayOfMind** isn't just about what you explore, but how you experience it. Prepare for a Minecraft that looks and sounds more immersive and beautiful than ever before. ### Visual Foundation At its core, **DayOfMind** utilizes **Sodium**, a powerful rendering engine replacement that significantly boosts frame rates and reduces stuttering. On top of this solid foundation, **Iris Shaders** allows you to add your favorite shader packs (like **Complementary Reimagined** or **Bliss Shaders**), transforming the game's lighting and atmosphere into something truly breathtaking. To see the performance benefits of Sodium: Extend your view distance dramatically with **Distant Horizons**: ### OptiFine Features, Fabric Performance Enjoy the visual customization many players love from OptiFine, but integrated seamlessly into the Fabric ecosystem for better performance and compatibility. **Continuity** brings beautiful connected textures for glass, bookshelves, sandstone, and more, along with support for emissive (glowing) textures. **Entity Model Features (EMF)** and **Entity Texture Features (ETF)** provide the magic behind custom entity models and textures, enabling resource packs like the included **Fresh Animations** to bring mobs to life with stunning new movements. **Entity Sound Features (ESF)** builds on this, allowing sounds to vary based on entity textures or models. Resource packs can also customize GUI screens thanks to **OptiGUI**, and **Polytone** unlocks deep customization of biome colors, map colors, lightmaps, custom sounds, particles, and much more, all through resource packs. ### Dynamic Effects and Personal Flair The world feels more alive with added visual details. **Visuality** adds subtle ambient particles like crystal sparkles and more noticeable effects when mobs are hit. **Particular** introduces beautiful 3D water splashes, leaves gently falling from trees, atmospheric cave dust, and charming fireflies. Show off your style with **Capes** and **Wavey Capes**, adding flowing capes compatible with various services. See yourself in action with **Not Enough Animations**, which adds improved third-person animations for actions like eating, rowing boats, holding maps, and climbing. And light up the darkness with **Sodium Dynamic Lights**, allowing torches and other light sources you hold to illuminate the world around you dynamically. ### Curated Resource Packs **DayOfMind** comes bundled with a selection of fantastic resource packs, enabled by default, to give you a stunning visual experience right away (though you can disable or change them as you wish!): *
Alacrity: A detailed, 32x pack with an RPG/Medieval feel and custom models
*
Bare Bones: A vibrant, simplistic pack mimicking the style of official Minecraft trailers.
*
Better Leaves: Makes tree leaves look wonderfully bushy and more realistic.
*
Fresh Animations: Overhauls mob animations, making them incredibly lifelike (Requires EMF & ETF).
*
Round Trees: Smooths the connection between log blocks for a rounder appearance.
*
Unique Dark: Provides a sleek, dark theme for UI elements with unique textures for functional blocks (requires OptiGUI).
*
Immersive Interfaces: Replaces standard container GUIs with beautiful pixel art scenes (requires OptiGUI).
### An Immersive Soundscape Prepare your ears! **DayOfMind** features a comprehensive audio overhaul. **Presence Footsteps** adds unique, material-dependent sounds for every step you take. **Sound Physics Remastered** introduces realistic sound propagation, including reverb based on your surroundings and sound dampening through walls. **Sounds** adds a huge collection of new UI sounds, block interaction sounds, and item sounds, making the world feel much more reactive. Supporting these is **RSLS (Raise Sound Limit Simplified)**, which increases the number of sounds Minecraft can play simultaneously, ensuring you hear all the rich details. For a taste of what a highly immersive Minecraft can sound and feel like: ## Smoother Adventures: Quality of Life Galore A bigger, more beautiful world is fantastic, but **DayOfMind** also focuses on making your interactions within it smoother, more intuitive, and less tedious. We've packed in a huge range of Quality of Life (QoL) mods designed to let you focus on the fun. ### Information at Your Fingertips Stay informed with enhanced UI elements. **Jade** provides a tooltip identifying the block or entity you're looking at, showing container contents, mob health, and more. Understand your hunger better with **AppleSkin**, which visualizes saturation and potential food restoration. Navigate advancements easily with **Better Advancements** and its full-screen UI, and celebrate achievements with **Advancement Plaques** which replaces boring toasts with fancy plaques. Dive deep into your accomplishments with **Better Stats**, offering a searchable and more detailed statistics screen. Make informed gear choices using **Equipment Compare**, which shows your currently equipped item's stats next to the one you're hovering over. And understand enchantments and effects instantly with **idwtialsimmoedm**, adding helpful descriptions to tooltips. ### Effortless Inventory Management Spend less time managing items and more time playing. **Carry On** lets you pick up and move chests (with contents!), furnaces, spawners, and even small mobs with your bare hands. Keep things tidy with **Inventory Sorter**, offering multiple ways to sort your inventory and chests (works server-side too!). Reduce lag from XP farms with **Clumps**, which groups XP orbs into single entities. Enjoy multiplayer looting without conflict thanks to **Lootr**, giving each player their own unique loot instance from chests. Speed up inventory interactions with **Mouse Tweaks**, enhancing dragging mechanics. Never run out of blocks mid-build with **Stack Refill**, automatically pulling replacements from your inventory. And access shulker box contents without placing them using **Easy Shulker Boxes**. ### Seamless World Interaction Interacting with the world feels more fluid. Never lose your gear again with **Universal Graves**, which creates a customizable grave on death to store your items and XP. Set up convenient travel networks using **Waystones** (also shown in "Tools for the Trail" section). Save time when leaving your world with **FastQuit**, returning you to the main menu instantly while the world saves in the background. Build faster and more precisely with **Accurate Block Placement**. Open double doors, trapdoors, and fence gates simultaneously with **Double Doors**. Protect your farmland from being trampled when harvesting melons or pumpkins with **Keep My Soil Tilled**. Make daring leaps into **Softer Hay Bales** to negate all fall damage. Easily get mobs out of boats and minecarts using **Dismount Entity**. Ensure your loyal companions always teleport with you thanks to **Followers Teleport Too**. Start your journey right with **Village Spawn Point**, guaranteeing a spawn in a village, and give those villages character with **Village Names**. And finally, hop over obstacles with ease using **Jump Over Fences**. ### Simplified Controls & Configuration Setting up your controls and configuring mods is a breeze. Find and resolve keybind conflicts effortlessly with **Controlling**. Access configuration screens for nearly all mods through the convenient **Mod Menu** (supported by **ModMenu Badges Lib**). Plug in your favorite controller and play your way with **Midnight Controls**. Many mods in this pack utilize user-friendly config libraries like **Cloth Config** and **YACL**, often accessible via **Mod Menu**. ## Optimized for Fun: Performance Under the Hood We know that feature-rich modpacks can sometimes struggle with performance. That's why **DayOfMind** was built from the ground up with optimization as a core pillar. We want you to enjoy all the new content without slideshow frame rates! Working tirelessly behind the scenes is a suite of powerful performance mods: * **Sodium**: Replaces Minecraft's rendering engine for massive FPS gains. * **Lithium**: Optimizes numerous game logic systems like mob AI, physics, and block ticking. * **FerriteCore**: Drastically reduces memory usage by optimizing how game data is stored. * **C2ME (Concurrent Chunk Management Engine)**: Improves chunk generation, loading, and I/O performance by utilizing multiple CPU cores. * **ModernFix**: An all-in-one solution improving launch times, reducing memory usage further, and fixing various bugs. But that's not all! **DayOfMind** includes numerous other optimization mods targeting specific areas, such as **ImmediatelyFast** (immediate mode rendering), **Krypton** (networking stack), **Alternate Current** (Redstone performance), **Entity Culling** & **More Culling** (skipping rendering of unseen objects), **Noisium** (world generation), **Let Me Despawn** (mob despawning logic), and **FastQuit** for that faster return to the title screen. This comprehensive approach ensures the smoothest possible experience as you explore the vast world. ## Gameplay Twists and Unique Additions Beyond enhancing vanilla, **DayOfMind** introduces some unique mechanics and expands core systems for a richer gameplay loop. ### New Ways to Play Equip powerful new gear with **Accessories**, a framework allowing mods to add rings, amulets, belts, and more (includes compatibility layers for Curios/Trinkets items). Experience flight like never before with **Do a Barrel Roll**, completely overhauling elytra movement for fun, semi-realistic control. Travel faster on your carefully built paths using **Block Runner**, and never get stuck attacking through annoying tall grass again thanks to **Cut Through**. ### Enhanced Utility Blocks Core utility stations get much-needed upgrades. **Easy Magic** makes enchanting less frustrating by keeping items in the table, allowing rerolls, and offering more flexible bookshelf placement. **Easy Anvils** removes annoying repair cost scaling, lets you repair anvils, and provides a dedicated interface for renaming name tags freely. See your recipes come together on the **Visual Workbench**, which displays items placed in the crafting grid directly on the block. And manage your crafting grid more efficiently with **Crafting Tweaks**, adding buttons to rotate, balance, or clear the grid. ### Expanded Storage Solutions Organize your treasures with powerful new storage options that fit the vanilla aesthetic. **Extended Drawers** offers compact, high-capacity storage for large quantities of single items, complete with upgrades, locking, voiding, and compacting features. **Tom's Simple Storage** provides a networkable system with terminals to access all connected inventories and even craft directly from stored items. See Tom's Simple Storage in action: ## Custom Content - DayOfMind Additions [![GitHub](https://img.shields.io/badge/GitHub-DOM_Additions-grey?style=flat-square&logo=github)](https://github.com/LufatZ/DOMAdditions) [![Crowdin](https://img.shields.io/badge/Crowdin-Translate_Additions-brightgreen?style=flat-square&logo=crowdin&logoColor=white)](https://crowdin.com/project/dayofmind-additions) This pack features its very own custom mod, **DayOfMind Additions**, designed specifically by LufatZ to enhance the building and aesthetic possibilities! Add beautiful new lighting with Copper, Diamond, Netherite, Amethyst etc Lanterns (including Redstone variants!). Expand your building palette immensely with new Slab and Stair variants for Grass, Dirt, Dirt Paths, Podzol, Coarse Dirt, Mycelium, Rooted Dirt, Moss, Mud, Muddy Mangrove Roots, Gold Blocks, Iron Blocks, Diamond Blocks, Smooth & Polished Basalt, Magma Blocks, Obsidian, and Crying Obsidian. Add intricate detail with new Trapdoor variants for Stone, Cobblestone, Stone Bricks, Granite, Diorite, Andesite, Deepslate variants, Tuff variants, Gold, Diamond, Netherite, Amethyst, and Quartz. And work more efficiently with area-of-effect tools like the Big Shovel and Hammer! All designed to feel right at home in vanilla Minecraft. Check out some features of DayOfMind Additions: ### Enhanced Mob Interactions The creatures of Minecraft get some attention too! Automate your animal farms with the **Animal Feeding Trough**. Find rare mounts more easily with **Skeleton Horse Spawn** and **Zombie Horse Spawn** adding natural spawns. Encounter new challenges with **Variants & Ventures**, adding biome-specific zombie and skeleton variants like the freezing Gelid, poisonous Thicket and Verdant, and the coral-dropping underwater Murk, complete with dungeon/trial chamber spawners. And enjoy the small visual touch of **Entity Pin Cushions**, making arrows realistically stick into mobs. Meet some new friends and foes from the **FriendsAndFoes** mod: ## Built for Community: Play Together! **DayOfMind** shines when shared with friends! We've included mods specifically to make multiplayer easier and more enjoyable. * **e4mc**: Effortlessly open your single-player world to friends over the internet! They don't even need the mod installed to join – just share the link **e4mc** provides. It's never been simpler to quickly jump into a world together.
Learn how to use e4mc:
* **Open Parties and Claims**: For more persistent servers, this mod offers robust chunk claiming to protect your builds and a party system to team up with friends, manage permissions, and coordinate your efforts. It integrates nicely with Xaero's maps too! * **Lootr**: Say goodbye to loot ninjas! **Lootr** makes chests in dungeons and structures provide unique loot for every player who opens them. No more racing to be first, everyone gets rewarded for exploring! * **Chat Heads**: Easily see who's talking in chat with player heads displayed next to messages. With a world begging to be explored together, features that ensure fairness, and tools to protect your shared creations, **DayOfMind** is the perfect backdrop for your next community adventure. Join our [Discord](https://discord.gg/yRkqCvFcmz) to find others to play with! ## Join the DayOfMind Adventure! Are you ready to rediscover Minecraft? To explore vast, beautiful new lands, delve into challenging structures, enjoy a feast for the senses, and do it all with smooth performance and countless conveniences? Then download **DayOfMind** today and begin your journey! We've poured our passion into creating an experience that blends the familiar charm of Minecraft with the excitement of endless discovery. We can't wait for you to see it. **Official Hosting Partner:** [![BisectHosting](https://www.bisecthosting.com/partners/custom-banners/336821a5-881a-4794-a73d-615473a99499.webp)](https://bisecthosting.com/dayofmind) Play DayOfMind with friends! Get a high-performance server from our partner **BisectHosting**. Use code **`dayofmind`** for **25% off** your first month! [Click here to order your server!](https://bisecthosting.com/dayofmind) Support the development on [Ko-fi](https://ko-fi.com/oxfatech) or [PayPal](https://www.paypal.com/donate/?hosted_button_id=DX93QEVJU725U)! Visit our website at [oxfatech.de](https://oxfatech.de/). Happy adventuring! *(Note: Many mods in this pack rely on library mods to function. Key libraries include Fabric API, Architectury API, Balm, Cardinal Components, Cloth Config, Collective, Fabric Language Kotlin, ForgeConfigAPIPort, FrozenLib, Iceberg, Library Ferret, MidnightLib, owo-lib, Placeholder API, Polymer, Puzzles Lib, Quad, Resourceful Config, TCDCommons, Toad Lib, TxniLib, YACL, and YUNG's API. These are included and work behind the scenes!)*
